Name: Command Frame
Description: Control Frame, besteht aus Start/Stop Transmissions, Konfigurationsfragen, Header-Info, Control Commands an PMUs, historische PMU-Datenabfragen.
Protocol: IEC 61850 GOOSE (with message authentication per IEC 62351-6), IEC 61850 MMS (IEC 62351-3 TLS 1.2/3), IEC 62351-7 (role-based access, audit trails), BSI IT-Grundschutz (logging, anomaly detection)
Threats:
• Insider Privilege Abuse
  • Timestamp Tampering
  • Communication Protocol Downgrade
  • Exploit Vulnerable Protocols
  • IoT Botnet Participation
  • Rogue Device Injection
  • Unauthorized Voltage Setpoint Change
  • Command Injection
  • Replay Attack
  • Man-in-the-Middle
